title: Intro video demo can be rendered locally
description: Ensure there is a concrete local demo workflow for the Intro to Canvas video (render + preview) so we can validate the pipeline end-to-end.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Feature: Local intro demo render
  Scenario: Render intro video locally
    Given the VideoML project exists
    When I run the render script
    Then an intro MP4 is produced
    And a poster JPG is produced

  Scenario: Preview intro video on the homepage
    Given I have rendered the intro video
    And I have set GATSBY_VIDEOS_BASE_URL to the local preview path
    When I run the Gatsby site locally
    Then the homepage video player loads the intro MP4
